Name: Redgate - SQL Clone, Delete Clone
Description:
Deletes a database clone with [Redgate SQL Clone](https://www.red-gate.com/products/dba/sql-clone/index).

Requires SQL Clone.

*Version date: 16th May 2019*

Parameters.Name: cloneServer
Parameters.Label: SQL Clone Server (required)
Parameters.HelpText: The URL for your SQL Clone server (e.g. http://sql-clone.example.com:14145)

Parameters.Name: cloneUser
Parameters.Label: SQL Clone User (optional)
Parameters.HelpText: User account to access SQL Clone. (If left blank Octopus tentacle account will be used.)

Parameters.Name: clonePassword
Parameters.Label: SQL Clone Password (optional)
Parameters.HelpText: User account to access SQL Clone. (If left blank Octopus tentacle account will be used.)

Parameters.Name: cloneSqlServer
Parameters.Label: SQL Server Instance (required)
Parameters.HelpText: The SQL Server instance the clone exists on. This SQL Server instance must have already been added to the SQL Clone Server specified above.

Parameters.Name: cloneName
Parameters.Label: Clone Name (required)
Parameters.HelpText: The name of the clone to delete.
